commands.review_summary:
This PR moves core doctor lint checks to ordered doctor health contributions, appends registered extension checks afterward, updates doctor docs/tests, and removes the temporary doctor health conversion-plan ledger.

PR surface: Source -90, Tests +518, Docs +2. Total +430 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows `doctor --fix` extension repair selects `check.kind !== "core"` without the core-ID collision guard that `doctor --lint` now applies. No runtime mutation was performed in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can make the narrow reserved-ID guard/test fix; broader compatibility and auth-provider acceptance remains maintainer judgment afterward.
